raw_text: pablo armada jiménez c/ real no. 33 28250 torrelodones, madrid, spain +34 690 37 52 73 pablo.armada.jimenez@gmail.com education technical university of madrid (upm) madrid, spain bsc/msc in aeronautical engineering (ingeniero aeronáutico superior). 2016 master thesis: wind turbine design. honors: aerodynamics, fluid dynamics, elasticity, strength of materials, calculus, mathematics, business administration. master in aircraft and spacecraft design. academic excellence award (2009), awarded to the top 5% students in madrid. goalkeeper of colegio mayor diego de covarrubias soccer team. colegio los sauces torrelodones madrid, spain highschool (bachillerato). graduated with honors. proffesional experience simon-kucher & partners madrid, spain associate consultant banking division. jan 2017 - present i work as a strategy consultant for top tier banks worldwide. working in projects for retail, corporate and investment banking. strengths trained: analytics, structure, synthesis and communication. main tasks accomplished: presented recommendations to ceo of a bank with 72m customers. managed several non-consultants teams to fulfil the aims of the projects. organized with another junior consultant the 2017 spanish banking simon-kucher strategy forum with more than 150 senior assistants from top strategy and investment boutiques. speakers: daniel lacalle (ranked 20th most influential economist in the world), lupina iturriaga (ceo of fintonic) and simon-kucher senior partners of the banking division. interviewed 12 undergraduate and post-mba candidates. repsol fuel station extremadura, spain assistant. 2009 - present i collaborated in the creation and, currently, in the management of my fathers company (11 employees repsol fuel station). 3m project. erasmus+ austria team leader. jul 2013, aug 2015 i managed to lead a group of bachelors in an erasmus+ summer exchange in austria. maximum responsible. aims: reducing unemployment, especially among young people. encouraging young people to take part in european democracy. supporting innovation, cooperation and reform. promoting cooperation and mobility with the eu's partner countries. love and care for people worldwide spain volunteering. aug 2015 - present i work directly with ini usanga, coo of love and care for people worldwide, a nonprofit foundation. motivating and leading children and youngsters with social and economic problems in africa and middle east. languages spanish: native. english: advanced. high c1. four-month stay in bray (ireland), during my primary education. german: elementary. daily classes during middle school. additional information courses: universidad politécnica de madrid - biophysics. final project: heat transfer and general thermodynamics between fish and ambient water. - domotics and smart homes. final project: green building in pozuelo, budget 300k. - sea farms engineering. final project: octopus sea farm, budget 3m. coursera - columbia university. financial engineering and risk management. - wharton. corporate finance. - stanford. applied game theory. - university of illinois at urbana-champaign. business strategy. - ie. market research and consumer behavior. it skills: proficiency in power point, excel and access. intermediate level in matlab, fortran, catia v5. basic level in java and c+. awards: 3 times finalist (once rank 4th) out of 55.000 participants in the national mathematics contest "olimpiadas matemáticas de primavera" representing my secondary school "los sauces torrelodones" for 5 years. challenging top students from my country and achieving top positions. tennis: local champion in my native town in 2001, 2002 and 2004. volunteering: engineer in ingenieros sin fronteras. collaborator with the local church nuestra seora de la asunción assisting poor and sick people. interests: teaching: teacher in mathematics, calculus and technical drawing at university level. cinema: more than 1000 films criticized in filmaffinity.com. healthcare, fitness and diet: dietary advisor and personal trainer in local gym member of amateur cyclist team.
